This article about a [Namibian](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") club is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Oshakati_City_F.C.&action=edit).

due to sponsorship reasons, is a [Namibian](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") [football (soccer)](/wiki/Football_(soccer) "Football (soccer)") [club](/wiki/Sports_club "Sports club") from [Oshakati](/wiki/Oshakati "Oshakati"). They play in the country's second division, the [Namibia First Division](/wiki/First_Division_(Namibia) "First Division (Namibia)"). [Oshakati](/wiki/Oshakati "Oshakati") is based in [Oshakati](/wiki/Oshakati "Oshakati") city in the northern part of the country. It was there for named after the original town, Oshakati, and most of the players are based in that town. The club has a huge sponsorship backing by First National Bank of Namibia and a local business tycoon, Benjamen (Kagau-B.H) Hauwanga, the owner of the BH Group of Companies operating in [Namibia](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") and [Angola](/wiki/Angola "Angola"). The club colors are red and white.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Namibian football club

Football club

Oshakati City

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Full name | Oshakati City Football Club |
| Nickname | Ekondobolo Lanangombe |
| Founded | 1966 |
| Ground | Embandu Stadium,   [Oshakati](/wiki/Oshakati "Oshakati"), [Namibia](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") |
| Capacity | 1,000[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*] |
| Chairman | [Benjamen Hauwanga](/w/index.php?title=Benjamen_Hauwanga&action=edit&redlink=1 "Benjamen Hauwanga (page does not exist)") |
| Manager | Petrus S Hauwanga |
| League | Namibia First Division |
|  | |
| |  |  | | --- | --- | | **[Home colours](/wiki/Kit_(association_football) "Kit (association football)")** | **[Away colours](/wiki/Away_colours "Away colours")** | | |
|  | |

The **Oshakati City**, also known as **FNB Oshakati City** due to sponsorship reasons, is a [Namibian](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") [football (soccer)](/wiki/Football_(soccer) "Football (soccer)") [club](/wiki/Sports_club "Sports club") from [Oshakati](/wiki/Oshakati "Oshakati"). They play in the country's second division, the [Namibia First Division](/wiki/First_Division_(Namibia) "First Division (Namibia)"). [Oshakati](/wiki/Oshakati "Oshakati") is based in [Oshakati](/wiki/Oshakati "Oshakati") city in the northern part of the country. It was there for named after the original town, Oshakati, and most of the players are based in that town. The club has a huge sponsorship backing by First National Bank of Namibia and a local business tycoon, Benjamen (Kagau-B.H) Hauwanga, the owner of the BH Group of Companies operating in [Namibia](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") and [Angola](/wiki/Angola "Angola"). The club colors are red and white.

The team has been relegated [Namibia Premier League](/wiki/Namibia_Premier_League "Namibia Premier League") in season 2010/2011.
